headline: Bernstein Initiates Coverage of Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) with Market Perform Recommendation
Freedom Broker Initiates Coverage of Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) with Buy Recommendation
Bernstein bullish on top cruise pick Viking, Norwegian gets market-perform rating
summary: Investing.com -- Bernstein initiated coverage of Viking Holdings with an Outperform rating and a $120 price target, while starting Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings at Market-Perform with an $18 target in a note on Wednesday, as analyst Richard Clarke rounded out the firm's cruise sector coverage.
